title: Pluribus
overview: The most miserable person on Earth must save the world from happiness.
reason: Created by acclaimed showrunner Vince Gilligan, this series boasts exceptional critical reception with an 87 Metacritic score and an 8.0 IMDb rating from over 127,000 votes, indicating massive popularity on Apple TV.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: Featuring Emmy-winning actors Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys, this Netflix drama has garnered significant attention with a 7.4 IMDb rating from over 61,000 votes and a solid 71 Metacritic score.

title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: This Netflix crime drama is highly anticipated, starring popular actors Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal, and has already accumulated over 65,000 IMDb votes with a strong 7.2 rating.

title: All Her Fault
overview: In Chicago, Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue, expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school. But the woman who answers the door isn't a mother she recognizes. She isn't the nanny. She doesn't have Milo. And so begins every parent's worst nightmare.
reason: Led by Emmy-winning actress Sarah Snook, this mystery series has a strong 7.5 IMDb rating from over 38,000 votes and an impressive 8.1 TMDB score, highlighting its popularity.

title: A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms
overview: A century before the events of Game of Thrones, two unlikely heroes wandered Westeros: a young, naive but courageous knight, Ser Duncan the Tall, and his diminutive squire, Egg. Set in an age when the Targaryen line still holds the Iron Throne and the last dragon has not yet passed from living memory, great destinies, powerful foes, and dangerous exploits await these improbable and incomparable friends.
reason: A highly anticipated HBO series from Game of Thrones creator George R.R. Martin, it boasts a strong 74 Metacritic score and an 8.478 TMDB rating, signaling significant cultural buzz and critical interest.
